seoMetaTitle: Power Integrations News & Updates | Product Releases, Events | LiTong
seoMetaDescription: Latest news and updates from Power Integrations. Product releases, technology announcements, trade show appearances, and company milestones.
seoKeywords: Power Integrations news, Power Integrations updates, Power Integrations product releases, Power Integrations events, Power Integrations announcements

faqs.question: What are Power Integrations' latest product releases?
faqs.answer: Power Integrations continues to innovate in power electronics with regular product updates. Recent releases include enhanced versions of the InnoSwitch3 family with improved efficiency, new LYTSwitch devices for smart lighting applications, and advanced BridgeSwitch motor drivers. Contact our sales team for information on the latest product availability.
faqs.decisionGuide: Subscribe to our newsletter or check this page regularly for the latest Power Integrations product announcements.

faqs.question: Where can I meet Power Integrations representatives?
faqs.answer: Power Integrations participates in major power electronics trade shows worldwide including APEC (Applied Power Electronics Conference), PCIM Europe, and various regional exhibitions. LiTong Electronics also hosts technical seminars featuring Power Integrations products. Check this page for upcoming event announcements and schedule meetings with our technical team.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to schedule a meeting at upcoming trade shows or technical seminars.

articles.title: Power Integrations Announces Enhanced InnoSwitch3 Family
articles.summary: Power Integrations releases enhanced InnoSwitch3 family with improved efficiency up to 95% and extended power range up to 150W.
articles.content: Power Integrations has announced an enhanced version of their industry-leading InnoSwitch3 family. The new devices feature improved synchronous rectification control, achieving up to 95% efficiency in flyback converters. The power range has been extended to 150W, addressing high-power adapter and industrial applications. Enhanced protection features include improved overvoltage and overcurrent protection with faster response times. The devices maintain pin compatibility with existing InnoSwitch3 products, allowing easy upgrades. Samples are available now with production quantities in Q2 2026.

articles.title: Power Integrations Expands LED Driver Portfolio with Smart Lighting Solutions
articles.summary: Power Integrations introduces new LYTSwitch devices with integrated wireless connectivity for smart lighting applications.
articles.content: Power Integrations has expanded their LED driver portfolio with new LYTSwitch devices featuring integrated wireless connectivity. These devices support Zigbee, Bluetooth Mesh, and Matter protocols, enabling seamless integration with smart home and building automation systems. The integrated approach eliminates the need for separate wireless modules, reducing BOM cost and simplifying design. The devices maintain the excellent dimming performance of the LYTSwitch family while adding smart control capabilities. Target applications include smart bulbs, connected downlights, and intelligent commercial lighting systems.

articles.title: Power Integrations Showcases Latest Solutions at APEC 2026
articles.summary: Power Integrations demonstrated their complete portfolio of power conversion solutions at APEC 2026 in Orlando, Florida.
articles.content: Power Integrations made a strong showing at APEC 2026, demonstrating their latest power electronics solutions to a global audience. Highlights included live demonstrations of the enhanced InnoSwitch3 family with 95% efficiency, new BridgeSwitch motor drivers for appliance applications, and SCALE-iDriver gate drivers for SiC MOSFETs. The Power Integrations booth attracted record visitor traffic with particular interest in smart lighting and EV charging solutions. Technical presentations covered topics including high-frequency power conversion, GaN technology, and advanced motor control. LiTong Electronics representatives were available to discuss customer applications and provide technical consultation.

articles.title: Power Integrations BridgeSwitch Achieves AEC-Q100 Grade 1 Qualification
articles.summary: Power Integrations' BridgeSwitch motor driver successfully completes AEC-Q100 Grade 1 qualification, enabling automotive motor control applications.
articles.content: Power Integrations announced that their BridgeSwitch motor driver family has successfully achieved AEC-Q100 Grade 1 qualification, opening the door to automotive motor control applications. The qualification process included extensive reliability testing including High Temperature Operating Life (HTOL), Temperature Cycling, and ESD testing. The BridgeSwitch devices are now qualified for operation from -40°C to +125°C, meeting the stringent requirements of automotive applications. This milestone represents Power Integrations' commitment to serving the growing electric vehicle market with high-reliability power solutions. The devices are particularly well-suited for HVAC blowers, cooling fans, and auxiliary pumps in EVs.

articles.title: Power Integrations Opens New Design Center in Shenzhen
articles.summary: Power Integrations expands R&D capabilities with new design center focused on Asian market requirements.
articles.content: Power Integrations has officially opened a new Design Center in Shenzhen, China. The facility houses state-of-the-art laboratories for power supply design, motor control development, and LED lighting solutions. The new center will focus on developing products optimized for Asian market requirements including high-density adapters, smart home appliances, and cost-effective LED drivers. Power Integrations has hired over 50 additional engineers to staff the facility, expanding their total Asian R&D team to more than 200 professionals. The investment represents Power Integrations' commitment to serving the rapidly growing Asian electronics market.

articles.title: Power Integrations Releases PI Expert 2026 with AI-Powered Optimization
articles.summary: Power Integrations launches new version of PI Expert design software with artificial intelligence for automated design optimization.
articles.content: Power Integrations has released PI Expert 2026, the latest version of their popular power supply design software. The new release features AI-powered optimization that can automatically explore thousands of design variations to find the optimal solution for specific requirements. Key enhancements include multi-objective optimization balancing efficiency, cost, and size; predictive thermal modeling using machine learning; automated EMI filter design; and cloud-based collaboration features. The software now supports all Power Integrations product families including the latest InnoSwitch3, BridgeSwitch, and SCALE-iDriver devices. PI Expert 2026 is available now as a free download for registered users.
